languages.text: {n}После недолгой паузы, Эоганн бросает сервочерепу:{/n} "Да, Нунциус, костная ткань не менее важна и стабильна, но выглядела бы менее убедительно в данном примере".
{n}After a brief pause, Eogunn adds, addressing the servo-skull,{/n} "Yes, Nuncius, bone tissue is no less vital and stable, but it would have been less convincing in this particular case."
languages.original_text: {n}После недолгой паузы, Эоганн бросает сервочерепу:{/n} "Да, Нунциус, костная ткань не менее важна и стабильна, но выглядела бы менее убедительно в данном примере".

traits.locale_text: {n}After a brief pause, Eogunn says to the servo-skull:{/n} "Yes, Nuntius, bone tissue is no less important and stable, but it would have been less convincing in this particular example."
{n}After a brief pause, Eogunn says to the servo-skull:{/n} "Yes, Nuntius, bone tissue is no less important and stable, but it would have been less convincing in this particular example."
{n}After a brief pause, Eogunn adds to the servo-skull:{/n} "Yes, Nuncius, bone tissue is no less vital and stable, but it would have been less convincing in this particular case."
{n}After a brief pause, Eogunn adds to the servo-skull:{/n} "Yes, Nuncius, bone tissue is no less vital and stable, but it would have been less convincing in this particular case."
{n}After a brief pause, Eogunn adds, addressing the servo-skull,{/n} "Yes, Nuncius, bone tissue is no less vital and stable, but it would have been less convincing in this particular case."
{n}After a brief pause, Eogunn adds, addressing the servo-skull,{/n} "Yes, Nuncius, bone tissue is no less vital and stable, but it would have been less convincing in this particular case."

languages.text: {n}Nach einer kurzen Pause fügt Eogunn an den Servoschädel gerichtet hinzu:{/n} "Ja, Nuncius, Knochengewebe ist ebenso lebendig und stabil, wäre in diesem besonderen Fall aber weniger überzeugend gewesen."
languages.original_text: {n}After a brief pause, Eogunn adds, addressing the servo-skull,{/n} "Yes, Nuncius, bone tissue is no less vital and stable, but it would have been less convincing in this particular case."

traits.locale_text: {n}Nach einer kurzen Pause fügt Eogunn an den Servoschädel gerichtet hinzu:{/n} "Ja, Nuncius, Knochengewebe ist ebenso lebendig und stabil, wäre in diesem besonderen Fall aber weniger überzeugend gewesen."

languages.text: {n}Après une courte pause, Eogunn ajoute à l'adresse du servocrâne :{/n} « Oui, Nuncius, le tissu osseux n'en est pas moins vital et stable, mais cela aurait été moins convaincant dans ce cas précis. »
languages.original_text: {n}After a brief pause, Eogunn adds, addressing the servo-skull,{/n} "Yes, Nuncius, bone tissue is no less vital and stable, but it would have been less convincing in this particular case."

traits.locale_text: {n}Après une courte pause, Eogunn ajoute à l'adresse du servocrâne :{/n} « Oui, Nuncius, le tissu osseux n'en est pas moins vital et stable, mais cela aurait été moins convaincant dans ce cas précis. »

languages.text: {n}短暂停顿后，伊奥贡对伺服头骨补充道：{/n}“没错，努恩修斯，骨组织同样充满活力且稳定，但在这种特定情况下，它的说服力略显不足。”
languages.original_text: {n}After a brief pause, Eogunn adds, addressing the servo-skull,{/n} "Yes, Nuncius, bone tissue is no less vital and stable, but it would have been less convincing in this particular case."

traits.locale_text: {n}短暂停顿后，伊奥贡对伺服头骨补充道：{/n}“没错，努恩修斯，骨组织同样充满活力且稳定，但在这种特定情况下，它的说服力略显不足。”

languages.text: {n}Tras una breve pausa, Eogunn añade, dirigiéndose al servocráneo:{/n} «Sí, Nuncius, el tejido óseo es igual de vital y estable, pero en este caso concreto habría sido menos convincente».
languages.original_text: {n}After a brief pause, Eogunn adds, addressing the servo-skull,{/n} "Yes, Nuncius, bone tissue is no less vital and stable, but it would have been less convincing in this particular case."

traits.locale_text: {n}Tras una breve pausa, Eogunn añade, dirigiéndose al servocráneo:{/n} «Sí, Nuncius, el tejido óseo es igual de vital y estable, pero en este caso concreto habría sido menos convincente».

languages.text: {n}少し間を置いて、エオグンがサーボスカルに付け加えた：{/n}「そうだよ、ヌンシウス、骨組織も生命力や安定性には劣らないが、この特別なケースでは説得力に欠けるだろう」。
languages.original_text: {n}After a brief pause, Eogunn adds to the servo-skull:{/n} "Yes, Nuncius, bone tissue is no less vital and stable, but it would have been less convincing in this particular case."

languages.text: {n}Kısa bir duraklamanın ardından Eogunn, hizmeletle konuşuyor.{/n} "Evet, Nuncius. Kemik dokusu da daha az hayati ve istikrarlı değil ancak bu özel durumda işi zorlaştırırdı."
languages.original_text: {n}After a brief pause, Eogunn adds, addressing the servo-skull,{/n} "Yes, Nuncius, bone tissue is no less vital and stable, but it would have been less convincing in this particular case."

traits.locale_text: {n}Kısa bir duraklamanın ardından Eogunn, hizmeletle konuşuyor.{/n} "Evet, Nuncius. Kemik dokusu da daha az hayati ve istikrarlı değil ancak bu özel durumda işi zorlaştırırdı."
